acceptance.proof: Two private serialized repeats bind the pinned official resolver to one unchanged production responder query/response on one explicit active interface with finite matching resolution and cleanup.
Production prefix remains exact and damaged pin, group, interface, count, matching, deadline, cleanup, limitation, and authority mutations reject.
Owner, Standard, public-boundary, documentation/instruction, and workflow gates pass without runtime or authority widening.

commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately; keep the official binary, private driver/harness inputs, raw records, interface/endpoints, diagnostics, environment, and machine identity private; production bytes must remain unchanged.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route end-to-end observation separately from broad compatibility.
Record exact finite composition and limitations.
Bind oracle, independent harness, raw/private evidence, and production source hashes.
Route focused damaged, Standard, and workflow checks.
Existing LSL/Quest/Manifold and public/private lanes cover the observation.
Existing observation, cleanup, and authority separation rules apply.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Review socket, protocol, evidence, and authority surfaces.

non_scope: Production runtime/API/activation changes, private query-value publication, interface enumeration/default selection/ambient fallback, other groups/ports/address families/interfaces, multiple queries/responses, retries/background workers, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, copied oracle source, raw records/endpoints/interface identity/diagnostics/environment, broad compatibility, routing/admission/commands, or Manifold authority.
objective: Observe only two serialized finite compositions of pinned pylsl 1.18.2/liblsl 1.17/protocol 110 resolver query handling by the unchanged capability-gated Rusty LSL production responder at exact 239.255.172.215:16571 on one caller-explicit active IPv4 host interface, with one query/response, matching resolution, deadline/cancellation, membership/socket cleanup, and sanitized hash-bound evidence.
outputs: One private independently controlled bounded composition driver or test-only harness with exact accepted source head and every attempt retained.
Two serialized pinned-official-to-production-responder active-interface repeats with finite completion, matching source, and cleanup.
One sanitized fixture/checker with hashes, exact dimensions, limitations, damaged mutations, documentation, policy, public-boundary, instruction, and workflow routes.
